data.content:
The problem is clear. The `GenerateSampleCode` target creates the file at build time, but MSBuild's implicit `Compile` glob expands at **evaluation time** — before any targets run. So the generated file is never passed to the compiler.

The fix: add the generated file to the `Compile` item group inside the target, and register it in `FileWrites` for proper cleanup.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add to Compile so the compiler sees it (globs expand at evaluation time, before this target runs) -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
      <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.reasoningText:
The issue is clear. The `GenerateSampleCode` target generates a `.cs` file during the build, but it doesn't add the generated file to the `Compile` item group. MSBuild's glob-based implicit includes (`<Compile Include="**/*.cs" />`) are evaluated at evaluation time, before any targets run. So files created during the build aren't automatically picked up.

The fix is to add the generated file to the `Compile` item group within the target, and also register it in `FileWrites` so it gets cleaned properly.

Let me use the skill for this.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add to Compile so the compiler sees it (globs expand at evaluation time, before this target runs) -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
      <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.content:
Build succeeds now. Here's the diagnosis and fix:

**Root cause:** MSBuild's implicit `Compile` glob (`**/*.cs`) expands at **evaluation time**, before any targets execute. The `GenerateSampleCode` target creates the file during **execution time**, so the compiler never sees it.

**Fix:** Added the generated file to the `Compile` and `FileWrites` item groups inside the target:
- `Compile` — tells the compiler to include the generated file
- `FileWrites` — ensures `dotnet clean` removes it properly
